name: Komoju
description: Degicas Tokyo-based payment gateway connecting global merchants to Konbini, Pay-easy, PayPay and JP wallets.

seo.title: Komoju — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Komoju: Degicas Tokyo-based payment gateway connecting global merchants to Konbini, Pay-easy, PayPay and JP wallets.

when_to_use: Konbini, Pay-easy, and PayPay acceptance for global merchants entering Japan
Japanese local payment method integration without Japanese entity requirement
Convenience store and QR wallet checkout for non-Japanese online merchants
Unified JP payment method API for global platforms expanding to Japan

pros: Best access to Japanese Konbini and Pay-easy
Supports PayPay and major JP wallets
Designed for global merchants entering Japan
cons: Fees higher than local Japanese processors
Smaller than Stripe Japan in coverage
review.verdict: Go-to bridge for non-Japanese merchants needing Konbini and local wallets without a JP entity.
review.best_for: Foreign merchants selling digital goods or services to Japanese consumers
review.not_for: Japan-domiciled enterprises — native PGs will be cheaper

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
